capabilities.description: Additional Linux capabilities granted to the container.

command.description: Command used to start the container.

created.description: Date and time when the container was created.

environment-variables.description: Environment variables configured for the container.

finished.description: Date and time when the container finished.

image.description: Reference to image used by the container.

ip-address.description: IP address assigned to the container.

mounts.description: Mount points attached to the container.

network-mode.description: Networking mode configured for the container.

ports.description: Exposed or mapped ports for the container.

privileged.description: Indicates whether the container was run in privileged mode.

security-opt.description: Security options applied to the container.

started.description: Date and time when the container was started.

state.description: Runtime state of the container (e.g., running, exited, paused).

user.description: User configured to run inside the container.

description: Generic container-instance object template to represent runtime container details.
name: container-instance
